message:
fix: isolate Dolt tests with per-test databases (dolt-test-1cf)

Replace shared "testdb" database with unique per-test database names
(testdb_<random>). Each test creates its own database and drops it in
cleanup, preventing cross-test data leakage and eliminating the risk
of tests connecting to production data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
